TailwindUI Home Features Pricing Docs Sign Up

Build faster with modern CSS utilities

A utility-first CSS framework packed with classes that can be composed to build any design, directly in your markup.

Get Started View Docs

Features

⚙

Utility-First

Build complex components from a constrained set of primitive utilities.

★

Responsive

Every utility can be conditionally applied at different breakpoints.

♦

State Variants

Style elements on hover, focus, active, and other states easily.
